hi: Hello! How can I assist you today?
fraud: You can report fraud using the fraud detection tools.
loan: You can check loan eligibility using the Loan Analyzer.
otp: Never share your OTP with anyone. Banks never ask for OTP.
phishing: Phishing links try to steal your login details. Always check website URL.
kyc: KYC scams trick users into updating fake bank information.
investment: Fraud investment groups promise unrealistic returns.
report fraud: Immediately contact your bank and report fraud at cybercrime.gov.in
shared otp: If you shared your OTP, contact your bank immediately and block your account.
